approaches.title: Two-pass candy assignment
approaches.summary: Assigns one candy to every child, scans left to right to satisfy increasing sequences, then scans right to left and takes the maximum needed for decreasing-se列u

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Initial O(n) time, O(n) space two-pass solution with conditional checks in both scans.
Simplifies the scan conditions by removing redundant candy comparisons and uses max during the reverse pass.
